results.message: Accessible name does not match or contain the visible label text
results.snippet: <a aria-label="SUT" href="/" class="navbar-brand p-0 me-2 logo_title">

results.message: The input element does not have an associated visible label
results.snippet: <button aria-label="Toggle navigation" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="main-navbar" data-bs-target="#main-navbar" data-bs-toggle="collapse" type="button" class="navbar-toggler collapsed">

results.message: Verify color is not used as the only visual means of conveying information
The ‘placeholder’ is the only visible label
results.snippet: <input spellcheck="false" placeholder="Enter your selector here" id="selector-input" class="form-control" type="text">

results.message: Form control has more than one label
Form control with "textbox" role has no associated label
results.snippet: <textarea role="textbox" aria-autocomplete="both" aria-haspopup="false" style="opacity: 0; font-size: 1px; transform: translate(0px, 0px);" spellcheck="false" autocapitalize="off" autocorrect="off" wrap="off" class="ace_text-input">

results.message: The <label> element does not have descriptive text that identifies the expected input
Verify the <form> element has a submit button or an image button
The ‘placeholder’ is the only visible label
results.snippet: <input required="" placeholder="you@example.com" name="email" id="email" class="form-control" type="email">

results.message: The SVG element has no accessible name

label_name_visible.0: Accessible name must match or contain the visible label text
label_name_visible.Fail_1: Accessible name does not match or contain the visible label text

input_label_exists.0: Each form control must have an associated label
input_label_exists.Fail_2: Form control with "{0}" role has no associated label

input_label_visible.0: An input element must have an associated visible label
input_label_visible.potential_no_label: The input element does not have an associated visible label
input_label_visible.potential_placeholder_only: The ‘placeholder’ is the only visible label

style_color_misuse.0: Combine color and descriptive markup to convey information
style_color_misuse.Potential_1: Verify color is not used as the only visual means of conveying information

label_content_exists.0: A <label> element must have non-empty descriptive text that identifies the purpose of the interactive component
label_content_exists.Fail_1: The <label> element does not have descriptive text that identifies the expected input

form_label_unique.0: Form controls should have exactly one label
form_label_unique.Fail_1: Form control has more than one label

form_submit_button_exists.0: A <form> element should have a submit button or an image button
form_submit_button_exists.Potential_1: Verify the <form> element has a submit button or an image button

svg_graphics_labelled.0: A non-decorative SVG element must have an accessible name
svg_graphics_labelled.fail_acc_name: The SVG element has no accessible name
